title: Tonkoss Rathba
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bureaucrat |image= |name=Tonkoss Rathba |homeworld=[[Daluba]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I can't begin to give you a full list of tyrants like Nom Anor that I've dealt with.''"
"''I have that very list available. Tonkoss Rathba of—|Leia Organa Solo and C-3PO|''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''}} '''Tonkoss Rathba''' was a being who was dictator of [[Daluba]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] had been involved in diplomacy with Rathba some time prior to the [[Osarian-Rhommamool conflict]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. and she considered Rathba to be something of a tyrant. [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] compared Rathba to [[Icknya]] and [[Nom Anor]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tonkoss Rathba |es=Tonkoss Rathba |pl=Tonkoss Rathba |pt=Tonkoss Rathba }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rathba, Tonkoss}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]]
